creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Prices in Copenhagen Denmark 🇩🇰

Denmark is one of the most expensive countries in the world, and I know many of you are interested in hearing about prices and the cost of living here. 

So here’s a full breakdown of stuff I bought on a festive day out in Copenhagen, Denmark 💸

What do you think about these prices, and what would stuff like this cost at a festival in your country? 🤔  #copenhagen #denmark #travelvlog

transcription.text: I'm sharing prices in Denmark and today I'm going to a festival here in Copenhagen but it's well hot so let's start the day with a non-alcoholic beverage to shock the body. I usually avoid the suburban train because it's just a tragic experience but I had to go for brunch at my mate's house before standing in the world's longest queue and then I had the option of getting a hipster cocktail or head over to the more normal bar. And by the way why did we go from half liter draft beers to 0.4 centiliters being the standard everywhere? That's always super annoying so naturally we got a pitcher because it just feels cheaper. I had a chicken burger that was pretty nasty but this mate vodka drink was excellent. What do you guys think about the prices here in Denmark?
